text:
Fifty~Fifty is an album by Megumi Hayashibara. It was published by King Records via the label KING AMUSEMENT CREATIVE with catalog number KICS-3693, it was released on 30 March 2018. https://vgmdb.net/album/74608 It contains the theme song of the CR Evangelion X pachinko game.

Composer: Go Takahashi
Arranger: Go Takahashi
Lyricist: Megumi Hayashibara

Track 02 - Anime Movie "THE END OF EVANGELION" Image Song
Composer: Shiro Sagisu
Arranger: Shiro Sagisu

Composer: Shiro Sagisu
Arranger: Shiro Sagisu
